name: StoneBridge Acquisition Corporation Warrant
summary: StoneBridge Acquisition Corporation is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The warrants give the holder the right to purchase shares of Class A common stock. The company is focused on businesses with enterprise values of $300 million to $600 million in the consumer and retail sectors in North America.
